name: Abbey Hulton & Townsend
description:
Abbey Hulton and Townsend are residential areas, featuring facilities such as the Hulton Abbey Historical Site, the Wallace Sports Centre, community gardens, a number of schools and churches. It is well supported by a number of community groups.

Properties are a mixture of the local authority, Sutton Trust, Beth Johnson and privately owned homes. Community spirit is very high and residents are more than happy to get actively involved with various community projects.
